summary: Frontend UI testing for Support page improvements. All 14 features verified working correctly: Contact cards removed, stats as inline badges, tab differentiation, pagination controls, list/grid views, service-specific tag colors, gradient backgrounds for tickets/modals/FAQ, AI chatbot with collapsed sidebar by default, expandable sidebar, and z-index 99999 for overlay coverage.
critical_code_review_comments: All UI improvements implemented correctly per requirements
TAG_COLORS object properly maps service types to Tailwind color classes (booking=blue, technical=red, hotels=rose, payment=emerald, etc.)
Ticket cards use bg-gradient-to-r from-[#082c59]/[0.03] via-slate-50/50 to-slate-100/40
Ticket detail modal uses bg-gradient-to-b from-[#082c59]/[0.04] to-slate-100/80
FAQ section uses bg-gradient-to-b from-[#082c59]/[0.04] to-slate-100/60
AI Chatbot sidebar correctly defaults to collapsed (w-0) with sidebarOpen state initialized to false
Chatbot overlay z-index is 99999 - properly covers sidebar and header
CSS class 'chatbot-overlay-open' correctly sets sidebar/header z-index to 0 when chatbot is open
Pagination shows 8 items per page with proper controls when needed
seed_data_creation: Used existing test tickets from previous iterations
context_for_next_testing_agent: Support page UI improvements fully tested. All features working: no contact cards, compact inline badges for stats (Open X, In Progress X, Resolved X), filled/outline tab styles, list/grid view toggle, service-specific tag colors, gradient backgrounds (#082c59/slate) for cards/modals/FAQ, AI chatbot with collapsed sidebar (expandable via toggle), z-index 99999 overlay. Pagination works when >8 tickets.

no_contact_cards.details: Call Us/Email Us/AI Chat contact cards successfully removed from Support page

compact_inline_badges.details: Stats displayed as compact inline badges: '5 Open', '0 In Progress', '0 Resolved' with rounded-full styling

tab_differentiation.details: My Tickets and FAQ tabs have clear filled/outline styles. Active tab uses bg-[#082c59] text-white shadow-md

pagination.details: Pagination controls implemented with ITEMS_PER_PAGE=8, showing prev/next buttons and page numbers when needed

list_grid_views.details: List and Grid view toggle buttons work correctly, switching between layouts

service_tag_colors.details: Tags have service-specific colors - booking=blue, technical=red, hotels=rose, payment=emerald, etc.

ticket_card_gradient.details: Ticket cards use bg-gradient-to-r from-[#082c59]/[0.03] via-slate-50/50 to-slate-100/40 (not plain white)

faq_gradient.details: FAQ section uses bg-gradient-to-b from-[#082c59]/[0.04] to-slate-100/60 with proper styling

ticket_modal_gradient.details: Ticket detail modal uses bg-gradient-to-b from-[#082c59]/[0.04] to-slate-100/80

ai_chatbot_collapsed_sidebar.details: AI chatbot sidebar is collapsed (w-0) by default - sidebarOpen initialized to false

ai_chatbot_expandable_sidebar.details: Sidebar expands to w-64 when toggle button (PanelLeftOpen icon) is clicked

ai_chatbot_overlay_zindex.details: Chatbot overlay z-index is 99999, CSS class 'chatbot-overlay-open' sets sidebar/header z-index to 0

backend_api_chat.details: /api/support/chat works with session persistence (verified in chatbot history)
